description: Minimalist fullstack microsite for the Mateo The Great media brand with YouTube hero, newsletter signup via Resend, and members-only exclusive content area.

userStories.title: Next.js Project Scaffold
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Next.js app created with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.
acceptanceCriteria: Run: npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir --import-alias '@/*' (use --yes or answer prompts)
Update package.json scripts: dev command uses port 7000 (next dev -p 7000)
Verify: npm run build completes without errors
Verify: npm run lint passes

userStories.title: Prisma Database Setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Prisma configured with the PostgreSQL database.
acceptanceCriteria: Run: npm install prisma @prisma/client
Run: npx prisma init
Update prisma/schema.prisma with User, Session, NewsletterSubscriber, ExclusiveContent models
User model: id (cuid), email (unique), name, passwordHash, emailVerified (Boolean default false), createdAt, updatedAt
Session model: id (cuid), userId (relation), token (unique), expiresAt, createdAt
NewsletterSubscriber model: id (cuid), email (unique), status (enum: ACTIVE, UNSUBSCRIBED), subscribedAt
ExclusiveContent model: id (cuid), title, slug (unique), content (text), type (enum: ARTICLE, VIDEO, ANNOUNCEMENT), createdAt, publishedAt (nullable)
Run: npx prisma db push (connects to DATABASE_URL from .env)
Create src/lib/db.ts with PrismaClient singleton export
Verify: npm run build passes

userStories.title: Tailwind Design Tokens
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the brand colors and design tokens configured in Tailwind.
acceptanceCriteria: Update tailwind.config.ts to extend colors with: brand-green (#5EC180), brand-cyan (#4CC2D5), brand-coral (#FF7593), brand-orange (#FF9F55), brand-yellow-light (#FFD683), brand-gold (#FFC927), brand-gray (#BCBCBC), dark (#0a0a0a), dark-alt (#1a1a1a)
Add Inter font via next/font/google in src/app/layout.tsx
Update src/app/globals.css: set body background to dark (#0a0a0a), text to white
Verify: npm run build passes

userStories.title: UI Components
userStories.description: As a developer, I need reusable Button, Input, and Card components.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/ui/button.tsx: variants (primary uses brand-coral, secondary uses brand-cyan), sizes (sm, md, lg), disabled state, loading state with spinner
Create src/components/ui/input.tsx: styled input with label, error message support, dark theme styling
Create src/components/ui/card.tsx: dark-alt background, subtle border, optional glow effect on hover
Export all from src/components/ui/index.ts
Verify: npm run build passes

userStories.title: Layout Shell
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see a consistent header and footer across all pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/layout/header.tsx: fixed position, brand name 'Mateo The Great' on left, nav links on right (Home, Exclusive, Sign In)
Create src/components/layout/footer.tsx: copyright '© 2024 MTG Intellectual Reserve, LLC', YouTube link to @_mateothegreat
Update src/app/layout.tsx: include Header and Footer, wrap children in main with min-h-screen
Verify: npm run dev starts and page renders at localhost:7000
Verify: npm run build passes

userStories.title: Landing Page Hero
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see an impactful hero section when I visit the homepage.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/app/page.tsx with hero section
Hero: full viewport height (min-h-screen), centered content
Display brand name 'Mateo The Great' as large heading (text-5xl md:text-7xl)
Tagline below: 'AI insights for the curious mind' or similar
Embed YouTube video using iframe (use video ID: dQw4w9WgXcQ as placeholder), youtube-nocookie.com domain
Add gradient accent using brand colors (coral to cyan)
Verify: npm run build passes

userStories.title: Newsletter Signup
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to subscribe to the newsletter from the homepage.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/actions/newsletter.ts with 'subscribe' server action
Server action: validate email format, check for duplicates, insert into NewsletterSubscriber table
Return { success: true } or { error: 'message' }
Create src/components/newsletter-form.tsx: email input, submit button, success/error message display
Add NewsletterForm to homepage below hero section
Verify: npm run build passes

userStories.title: Resend Email Setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Resend configured to send transactional emails.
acceptanceCriteria: Run: npm install resend
Create src/lib/email.ts: export resend client instance using RESEND_API_KEY
Create src/lib/email-templates.ts: export functions for welcomeEmail(), verificationEmail(token), passwordResetEmail(token)
Each template returns { subject, html } object with inline-styled HTML
Update newsletter server action to send welcome email after successful subscription
Verify: npm run build passes

userStories.title: Auth Utilities
userStories.description: As a developer, I need password hashing and session management utilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Run: npm install bcryptjs && npm install -D @types/bcryptjs
Create src/lib/auth.ts with: hashPassword(password), verifyPassword(password, hash), generateSessionToken(), createSession(userId), getSession(cookies), destroySession(cookies)
Sessions stored in database, token stored in HTTP-only cookie named 'session'
Create src/middleware.ts: check session cookie, add user to request context for protected routes (/account, /exclusive/*)
Verify: npm run build passes

userStories.title: Sign Up Page
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to create an account.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/signup/page.tsx with sign up form
Form fields: email, password, confirm password
Create src/app/actions/auth.ts with signUp server action
Validation: email format, password min 8 chars, passwords match
On success: create user with hashed password, send verification email, redirect to /signin with message
On error: display error message on form
Verify: npm run build passes

userStories.title: Sign In Page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to sign into my account.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/signin/page.tsx with sign in form
Form fields: email, password
Add signIn server action to src/app/actions/auth.ts
Validation: check credentials against database
On success: create session, set cookie, redirect to /account
On error: display 'Invalid email or password' message
Add 'Forgot password?' link to /forgot-password
Verify: npm run build passes

userStories.title: Password Reset Flow
userStories.description: As a user, I want to reset my password if I forget it.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/forgot-password/page.tsx: email input form
Add requestPasswordReset server action: generate token, store in user record with expiry (1 hour), send reset email
Create src/app/reset-password/page.tsx: reads token from URL, shows new password form
Add resetPassword server action: validate token not expired, update password hash, clear token
On success: redirect to /signin with success message
Verify: npm run build passes

userStories.title: Account Page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view and manage my account settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/account/page.tsx (protected route)
Display current user email and name
Form to update name
Form to change password (current password, new password, confirm)
Sign out button that destroys session and redirects to /
Add updateProfile and changePassword server actions
Verify: npm run build passes

userStories.title: Exclusive Content List
userStories.description: As a member, I want to browse exclusive content.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/exclusive/page.tsx
If authenticated: fetch and display ExclusiveContent from database as card grid
Each card shows: title, type badge, publishedAt date, link to /exclusive/[slug]
If not authenticated: show teaser message with sign up CTA
Handle empty state: 'No exclusive content yet. Check back soon!'
Verify: npm run build passes

userStories.title: Exclusive Content Detail
userStories.description: As a member, I want to read individual exclusive content.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/exclusive/[slug]/page.tsx (protected route)
Fetch content by slug from database
Display: title, type badge, publishedAt, content (render as HTML or markdown)
Back link to /exclusive
404 if slug not found
Redirect to /signin if not authenticated
Verify: npm run build passes

userStories.title: Seed Placeholder Content
userStories.description: As a developer, I need sample content in the database.
acceptanceCriteria: Create prisma/seed.ts with sample ExclusiveContent entries
Add 3 articles: 'The Rise of AI Agents', 'Claude vs GPT: A Comparison', 'Building with Next.js 14'
Each has: title, slug (kebab-case), content (2-3 paragraphs markdown), type ARTICLE, publishedAt
Update package.json: add prisma.seed config pointing to seed.ts
Run: npx prisma db seed
Verify: seed runs without errors

userStories.title: Health Check Endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a health check endpoint for Railway.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/health/route.ts
GET handler returns { status: 'ok', timestamp: Date.now() }
Test database connection in health check, return { status: 'error' } if db fails
Verify: npm run build passes
Verify: curl http://localhost:7000/api/health returns JSON response

nonGoals: No admin panel/CMS (content managed directly in database for now)
No blog or public content beyond landing page
No dark/light mode toggle (dark mode only)
